package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for middleware_rebinds_body_after_handler_bind: Middleware or helper chains that parse the request body after the main handler has already bound it.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule327NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule327NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule327NegativeRecord) (Rule327NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario327Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule327NegativeService, input Rule327NegativeRecord) (Rule327NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule327NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
